Value: Faster tendon recovery
BPC-157 promoted tendon outgrowth, cell migration, and survival in injured Achilles tendons in a controlled rat model. [PubMed]
Soothes the gut lining
Repeated preclinical studies show BPC-157 protects the gastrointestinal mucosa and accelerates healing of ulcers and inflammatory bowel injury. [PubMed]
Heals strained joints
Improved healing of transected medial collateral ligaments with faster functional recovery versus controls in a rat injury model. [PubMed]
Speeds up healing
Activates VEGFR2-Akt-eNOS signaling and angiogenesis pathways implicated in vascular and wound recovery. [PubMed]
Calms inflammation
Reduces pro-inflammatory cytokines and oxidative-stress markers across multiple injury models. [PubMed]
Smoother, renewed skin
Remodels the dermal extracellular matrix and supports tissue regeneration after skin injury. [PubMed]
Younger-looking skin
Modulates expression of more than 4,000 human genes back toward a more youthful profile. [PubMed]
Boosts collagen
Stimulates fibroblast collagen, elastin, and proteoglycan production in dermal studies. [PubMed]
Stronger, fuller hair
Increases hair-follicle size and reduces follicle-cell apoptosis in scalp-tissue models. [PubMed]
Antioxidant shield
Quenches reactive oxygen species and protects keratinocytes from UV-induced oxidative damage. [PubMed]
Builds trust & connection
Intranasal oxytocin significantly increased trust behavior in a controlled human economic-game study. [PubMed]
Calms stress under pressure
Combined with social support, suppressed cortisol and subjective stress in a psychosocial stress test. [PubMed]
Sharper social awareness
Improved recognition of subtle emotional cues from the eyes in a placebo-controlled human trial. [PubMed]
Brighter social memories
Enhanced recall of positive social information in a double-blind, placebo-controlled human trial. [PubMed]
Quiets social anxiety
fMRI evidence shows dampened amygdala reactivity to threatening social stimuli. [PubMed]
Boosts brain growth signals
Elevates brain-derived neurotrophic factor (BDNF) and TrkB activity in the rat basal forebrain. [PubMed]
Supports brain recovery
Improved neurological outcomes versus placebo in patients with acute ischemic stroke in a clinical trial. [PubMed]
Sharper focus & memory
Studied as a nootropic peptide that modulates attention and working memory under cognitively demanding tasks. [PubMed]
Protects brain cells
Modulates neurotrophic and anti-apoptotic gene expression implicated in neuronal survival. [PubMed]
Calms the stress response
A non-hormonal ACTH 4-10 derivative with documented anxiolytic and stress-buffering effects in animal models. [PubMed]
Supports heart recovery
Activates integrin-linked kinase, promoting cardiomyocyte migration, survival, and tissue repair after cardiac injury. [PubMed]
Faster tissue repair
Reviewed across studies as an actin-sequestering peptide that accelerates repair of skin, cornea, and heart tissue. [PubMed]
Promotes hair regrowth
Stimulates hair growth via stem-cell migration in follicular bulge regions in murine studies. [PubMed]
Eases inflammation
Suppresses NF-κB-driven inflammatory mediators and accelerates dermal wound closure in animal trials. [PubMed]
Skin & eye-surface healing
Accelerated re-epithelialization and reduced inflammation in preclinical and clinical corneal-injury studies. [PubMed]
